error_signature: modal grey area not covering side menu
title: Modal grey area not covering side menu
symptom: The grey overlay from the modal does not cover the side menu, preventing it from closing the modal when clicked.
applies_when: Using a modal that appears from the right
Side menu is present on the left
not_this_if: Z-axis values are already correctly configured
root_cause: The side menu has a higher Z-axis value than the modal overlay, causing it to appear above the overlay and preventing the desired interaction.
fix_steps: Change the Z-axis value of the side menu to a smaller number (e.g., 2).
Set the Z-axis of the modal overlay to a value higher than the side menu (e.g., 4).
Ensure the modal content has the highest Z-axis value (e.g., 6).
agent_instruction: Adjust the Z-axis values of the modal, overlay, and side menu as specified.
